parameters.description: Chapter data (number omitted for oneshot manga)
parameters.name: body

409.description: Duplicate chapter number or oneshot already has a chapter

post.description: Enqueues a ZIP upload for async processing. Returns 202 with a task_id to poll for status.

delete.summary: Delete a comment (comment owner or manga owner)

post.description: For oneshot manga only. Enqueues zip processing; Lambda creates the chapter and uploads pages. Returns 202 with a task_id to poll for status.

400.description: Not a oneshot or invalid ZIP
